topic: Google MCP Toolbox Oracle support and Antigravity MCP teaching plan

key_findings.mcp_toolbox_status: googleapis/mcp-toolbox v1.5.0 was released on 2026-06-18 and includes current Oracle support
key_findings.oracle_prebuilt: MCP Toolbox can run an Oracle prebuilt server with --prebuilt oracledb --stdio
key_findings.oracle_source: MCP Toolbox also supports explicit Oracle sources with pure Go or OCI/godror driver modes
key_findings.google_cloud_oracle_mcp: Google Cloud Oracle Database exposes a remote MCP endpoint at https://oracledatabase.googleapis.com/mcp
key_findings.antigravity_config: Antigravity MCP config is user-level at ~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json; project-local .gemini MCP config is not the current documented path
key_findings.recommendation: Teach two clean Antigravity MCP lanes: SQLcl MCP for local/demo SQL operations and Google MCP Toolbox Oracle for database-inspection/toolbox workflows
